## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what do you want RepoMind to do? -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this useful? What workflow does it unblock? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How do you imagine this working? Be as specific as you can about the agent flow, API shape, or tool behaviour. -->

## Affected Area

- [ ] Agent — Planner (`agent/planner.py`)
- [ ] Agent — Executor / tool selection (`agent/executor.py`)
- [ ] Agent — Memory (`agent/memory.py`)
- [ ] New tool (`tools/`)
- [ ] Prompt template (`prompts/`)
- [ ] API endpoint (`api/routes.py`, `api/schemas.py`)
- [ ] Configuration (`config/settings.py`)
- [ ] CI / GitHub Actions
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

## Roadmap Alignment

<!-- Does this relate to an item on the roadmap? -->

- [ ] GitLab / Bitbucket support
- [ ] Streaming job status via WebSockets
- [ ] LlamaIndex-based codebase indexing for large monorepos
- [ ] Multi-file, multi-PR orchestration
- [ ] Fine-tuned code generation model
- [ ] Plugin system for custom tools
- [ ] Not on the current roadmap
